speaker: agent
text: Hi, this is Riya calling from the insurer regarding your policy renewal. Am I speaking with Mr. Sharma?

speaker: agent
text: Great. Your auto policy is due for renewal next month. I wanted to check if you had any questions before we proceed.

speaker: customer
text: Actually, I recently bought a second car for my daughter. Does that change anything?

speaker: agent
text: Noted, I'll make sure that's on file. Now, about the renewal terms for your existing vehicle...

speaker: agent
text: Your premium stays the same as last year assuming no claims were filed.

speaker: customer
text: Okay, that sounds fine to me.
